jokes.text: She's doomed.
jokes.setup: Louie is supposedly helping calm down a stranded, panicked driver
jokes.punchline: His blunt assessment that she's doomed
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment for Louie - his callous honesty delivered with perfect deadpan timing. Maximum comedic impact with minimal words.

jokes.text: Where are my mittens?
jokes.setup: Latka boasts about how dangerous his homeland is with wolves, boars, and avalanches
jokes.punchline: His immediate concern shifts to finding mittens for a little snow
jokes.explanation: Brilliant deflation of Latka's tough-guy posturing. The contrast between facing avalanches and needing mittens is perfectly timed and character-specific.

jokes.text: Oh! Oh! Oh!
jokes.setup: Latka confidently dismisses the danger of snow
jokes.punchline: His immediate distressed reaction upon experiencing the cold
jokes.explanation: Simple physical comedy reinforcing the mittens joke. Functional but not particularly clever.

jokes.text: Never hurts to check, you know.
jokes.setup: Latka finds a stranded woman and confirms her identity
jokes.punchline: His overly cautious explanation for verifying who she is
jokes.explanation: Mild humor from Latka's methodical nature in an emergency. Decent character moment but low comedic impact.

jokes.text: Winter.
jokes.setup: Bates asks what's wrong with her car
jokes.punchline: Latka's overly simplified diagnosis
jokes.explanation: Brilliant economy - one word that perfectly captures the absurdity of diagnosing car trouble. Simple but effective.

jokes.text: Oh, come on, turn that frown upside down.
jokes.setup: Bates is freezing and frustrated about the car not working
jokes.punchline: Latka's inappropriately cheerful cliche in a dire situation
jokes.explanation: Works for Latka's optimistic character but relies on a tired cliche. The situational inappropriateness gives it some lift.

jokes.text: Oh, I hope it is the right size for you.
jokes.setup: Latka offers his coat to freezing Bates
jokes.punchline: Visual reveal that his coat is comically oversized on her
jokes.explanation: Standard visual gag of ill-fitting clothing. Latka's polite concern adds character flavor but it's predictable comedy.

jokes.text: Oh!
jokes.setup: Latka has given her his coat
jokes.punchline: Surprised reaction, likely to coat being too small or ridiculous looking
jokes.explanation: Standard visual gag payoff. Gets the job done but unremarkable.

jokes.text: I feel terrible that you're going to freeze to death to save me. I am?
jokes.setup: Bates feels guilty that Latka sacrificed his clothes
jokes.punchline: Latka's confused realization that he'll freeze too
jokes.explanation: Great character moment showing Latka's good heart but poor planning. His innocent confusion about his own fate is endearing and funny.

jokes.text: Oh, no, no, no, you're not paranoid. Don't worry, we're going to freeze to death.
jokes.setup: Bates asks if she's paranoid about freezing to death
jokes.punchline: Latka's reassuring tone while confirming their doom
jokes.explanation: Excellent subversion - Latka comforts her by confirming her worst fears. The casual delivery of terrible news is perfectly Latka.

jokes.text: We can have sex.
jokes.setup: They're discussing what they can do to survive the cold
jokes.punchline: Bates' matter-of-fact suggestion of sex for warmth
jokes.explanation: Bold escalation that shifts the episode into cringe territory. The matter-of-fact delivery makes it funnier than if played seductively.

jokes.text: Sex, death... Sex, death, hmm...
jokes.setup: Bates presents the choice between sex and freezing
jokes.punchline: Latka actually weighing the options out loud
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Latka's innocent, analytical nature. The fact that he's genuinely deliberating makes it both funny and endearing.

jokes.text: This is too perfect. I actually get to die from rejection.
jokes.setup: Latka rejecting her survival-sex proposal on moral grounds
jokes.punchline: Her darkly comic observation about dying from sexual rejection
jokes.explanation: Darkly funny line with good economy and ironic twist on romantic rejection

jokes.text: Why don't you tell me a little bit about yourself?
jokes.setup: After weighing sex vs. death options
jokes.punchline: Latka treating it like a first date instead of survival sex
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character comedy - Latka's old-world politeness in the most inappropriate situation. Shows his genuine sweetness even in crisis.

jokes.text: Dear Jim Ignatowski, we are pleased to welcome you as a member of our family of satisfied MasterCard holders.
jokes.setup: Jim is excited about feeling complete and joining a family
jokes.punchline: It's just a credit card welcome letter
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Jim's desperate need for connection. The corporate 'family' language exploitation is well-observed.

jokes.text: Don't badmouth my family, Alex.
jokes.setup: Alex tries to explain that 'family' is just marketing speak
jokes.punchline: Jim's defensive response about MasterCard being his family
jokes.explanation: Solid follow-up to the MasterCard family joke. Jim's sincere commitment to the delusion is both sad and funny.

jokes.text: Please, Elaine, I have no more to give.
jokes.setup: Elaine praises Latka as a hero for the rescue
jokes.punchline: Latka's dramatic, depleted response to praise
jokes.explanation: Shows Latka's guilt weighing on him, delivered with characteristic drama. Good character moment but not exceptional comedy.

jokes.text: I am not a hero. I am a stinkbug.
jokes.setup: Alex calling Latka a hero
jokes.punchline: Latka's self-comparison to a stinkbug
jokes.explanation: Good character work and funny choice of insect for self-comparison

jokes.text: Oh, no, no, no, no, that's right. They were on her back.
jokes.setup: Latka worries about explaining scratches on his back
jokes.punchline: His correction that the scratches were on her back instead
jokes.explanation: Reveals more details about the encounter while showing Latka's innocent confusion about the implications. Slightly cheap but character-appropriate.

jokes.text: You did it with another woman!
jokes.setup: Latka returns home and greets Simka normally
jokes.punchline: Simka's immediate, certain accusation
jokes.explanation: Perfect timing and delivery. Simka's intuition cutting through pleasantries creates great dramatic tension and comedy.

jokes.text: Here, damn guest. Now, you have no problems. Eat hearty!
jokes.setup: Alex tries to leave during the marital crisis
jokes.punchline: Simka's sarcastic insistence on hospitality despite her rage
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character moment showing cultural priorities even in crisis. Simka's furious hospitality is both absurd and believable.

jokes.text: Here, damn guest. Now, you have no problems. Eat hearty!
jokes.setup: Alex trying to leave during their marital crisis
jokes.punchline: Simka's aggressive hospitality despite her anger
jokes.explanation: Great character work showing cultural obligation trumping personal crisis

jokes.text: fleshy union
jokes.setup: Simka demands Latka look her in the eye and deny infidelity
jokes.punchline: Her euphemistic phrase for sex
jokes.explanation: Memorable euphemism that's both funny and character-appropriate. The formal language contrasts beautifully with the emotional situation.

jokes.text: The damn guest is uncomfortable? Oh, are you uncomfortable? No, not really. Then sit down!
jokes.setup: Alex tries to leave, saying he's making them uncomfortable
jokes.punchline: Simka's forceful logic trapping him at dinner
jokes.explanation: Great callback to the hospitality obsession with escalated intensity. Simka's irrational but internally consistent logic is perfectly performed.

jokes.text: I did it for you.
jokes.setup: Simka demands to know why Latka was unfaithful
jokes.punchline: His claim that adultery was done for her benefit
jokes.explanation: Brilliant reversal of guilt. The audacity of the claim combined with Latka's sincere delivery makes it both shocking and funny.

jokes.text: Take my word for it, it was you.
jokes.setup: Latka claims he was thinking of Simka during the encounter
jokes.punchline: His request to skip the explicit details
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Latka's sweet attempt to minimize the betrayal, but the joke structure is fairly predictable.

jokes.text: Next time, bring some of your damn friends.
jokes.setup: Simka sarcastically thanks Alex for the lovely evening
jokes.punchline: Her bitter suggestion that he bring friends to witness more marital disasters
jokes.explanation: Another great 'damn guest' callback with escalated bitterness. Simka's hostility wrapped in hospitality is consistently funny.

jokes.text: CRASH sound as Alex is hit by thrown object
jokes.setup: Alex gives advice about talking calmly to resolve their problems
jokes.punchline: Simka's violent response to his marriage counseling
jokes.explanation: Classic physical comedy punctuating the emotional tension. The timing and Alex's interruption of his own advice works well.

jokes.text: He has already heard a man who raised his voice to his mother.
jokes.setup: Reverend Gorky claims nothing can shock him
jokes.punchline: His example of the worst sin he's heard is raising one's voice to mother
jokes.explanation: Great setup for the contrast between the priest's sheltered experience and what he's about to hear. Well-crafted misdirection.

jokes.text: So Simka must sin with someone she works with. But Simka doesn't work. So Simka must sin with someone Latka works with.
jokes.setup: The priest decrees that Simka must commit equivalent adultery
jokes.punchline: The logical progression that leads to her sleeping with Latka's coworkers
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation with perfect comic logic. The step-by-step reasoning that leads to an absurd conclusion is expertly structured.

jokes.text: But Simka doesn't work.
jokes.setup: The priest's solution requiring Simka to sin with a coworker
jokes.punchline: Pointing out the logical flaw in the plan
jokes.explanation: Good logical observation that makes the situation even more absurd

jokes.text: Baby, you're the greatest.
jokes.setup: Simka asks if Latka understands she'll sleep with one of his friends
jokes.punchline: Louie's enthusiastic response to being chosen
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment for Louie - completely missing the tragedy while being thrilled at the opportunity. Excellent episode closer.
